overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a female character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a historic city at night. The character progresses from a narrow colonnaded street into a grand open plaza featuring monumental statues, with the environment illuminated by torchlight against a deep blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade street with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the colonnaded street, passing by market stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green robe walking along the colonnade

entered.detail: covered walkway with white stone columns and lattice screens
mud-brick and stone buildings with wooden awnings
burning torches mounted on columns providing warm light
fabric awnings covering merchant stalls along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow ancient Egyptian street lined with a colonnade on the left and residential buildings on the right. Torchlight illuminates the stone pavement while a few pedestrians move about the market area.

events.description: exits the covered colonnade into a wider avenue with a large white stone wall on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue alongside the monumental wall, approaching the city plaza

notable_agents.action: child running along the base of the white wall

entered.detail: large white stone temple wall with decorative reliefs and burning braziers
tall palm trees visible behind buildings on the right

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider avenue dominated by a massive white stone wall on the left, likely a temple or palace boundary. The character walks past a running child as the environment transitions toward a more open area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial plaza with colossal statues

events.description: enters the wide open plaza with large monumental statues becoming visible ahead
passing between two massive statues on pedestals flanking the central path

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand plaza toward the distant city center, passing between monumental statues

entered.detail: massive stone statue of a warrior figure on a raised pedestal
tall stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal flanking the entrance
distant cityscape with multiple buildings and structures visible under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast ceremonial plaza dominated by two colossal statues flanking the central pathway. The open space reveals a panoramic view of the distant city illuminated by scattered lights, with the character walking between the massive monuments toward the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban corridor into a grand, open ceremonial space under a deep blue night sky. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow Egyptian street, where torchlight flickers against a colonnade and residential buildings. As the path widens, the scene shifts toward a broad avenue dominated by a massive white stone wall, passing a running child as the architecture begins to open up. The camera then emerges from the enclosure into a vast plaza, where the perspective expands to reveal two colossal statues flanking the way. Finally, the view opens into a panoramic vista of the distant, illuminated city as the character walks between the monuments toward the urban center.
